evidence_snippet: LouisianaLawHelp.org provides free legal help routing for Louisianans, preserves legal aid organization search, and supports Find a Lawyer by parish with named legal-aid programs and Louisiana parish coverage.
review_notes: This is a statewide legal-help portal with parish search and legal-aid organization routing, not a single-region office.
The portal is a stronger statewide legal-aid/help source than any one local legal-aid provider page.
